item.title: Grace Percival
item.description: Saved under People / Artist / International from the artist reference list. Use this entry for fine art, illustration, gallery, painting, craft, textile, sculpture, photography, and visual moodboard references. Primary location/focus: UK / Contemporary Seascape Painter.
